name: Professor Elm's Training Method - Dragon Frontiers

cards.name: Professor Elm's Training Method
cards.effect: Search your deck for an Evolution card, show it to your opponent, and put it into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward.

tests.name: searches_for_evolution
tests.description: Test that Prof Elm's searches for an Evolution card

tests.name: only_finds_evolutions
tests.description: Test that Prof Elm's cannot find Basic Pokemon
